title: ホープフルSの後に・できた？

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Gyuh... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Forget that! Look at the board!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: My number's up there! You see it? Look already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan points at the board, jumping up
and down in excitement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's already left her mark on the highest tier of
racing.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Not bad, huh?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan! There's a press conference going
on and we'd love for you to participate.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! A press conference? Me?!
choice_data_list:
Looks like you're on the fast track to making it
big.

Looks like you're on the fast track to making it
big.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
...Hehehe! Now watch how it's done. I'm about to
go kill it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan is all bravado as she heads over to
the press, but...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh...

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: Let's see... The next question is for Tosen Jordan.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to know your thoughts about next steps
after today. Considering your aptitude, I expect
you'll aim for medium or long distance, but...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So, uhh... like, what are you asking me?

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry?
choice_data_list: They're asking about your next goal!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! Okay, okay.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Uhh, the Triple Crown. I'm going for the Triple
Crown, 'cause I... wanna make it big!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So the Satsuki Sho, Japanese Derby, and Shuka
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
R-right, that! The Satsuki Sho, Derby, and Kikuka
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text: You think she was being serious?

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
Doubt it. Would someone serious about the
Classic Triple Crown mess up the names of its
races?

text_block_list.name: Reporter D
text_block_list.text:
Plus, she was playing with her nails the whole
time. Probably wasn't even paying attention. I
wouldn't expect anything from her.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
choice_data_list: But that really is your goal...
But that really is your goal...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It's fine. Honestly, I don't even care.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: They'll see when I actually win the Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Anyway, I'm gonna get changed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan walks back to the waiting room in a
visible slump.
choice_data_list:
(First up, we'll make everyone eat those words
at the Satsuki Sho.)

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's her... Is she crying?

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text: Hey, you're Tosen Jordan's trainer, right?

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ah, great! I'd love to observe her training
sometime!

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
I was really intrigued by her performance and
interview today. It's been a while since I've seen
eyes so full of determination.

text_block_list.name: Reporter in Flat Cap
text_block_list.text:
So... was she really serious about going for the
Triple Crown?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As long as she keeps running her way, slowly but
surely more people will take note of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And it'll all start with the Satsuki Sho.
